query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A landscape view of rolling terrain densely covered in low bushes and shrubs that appear pale white. Above, a deep purple sky filled with scattered cumulus clouds stretches toward the horizon, where a flat plain extends to meet a thin vertical structure visible in the far distance. Shadows fall across the undulating ground, and textured foliage fills the foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal landscape in which rolling hills of dense shrubs are rendered in ghostly pale white against a deep violet sky, rejecting ordinary realism for a dreamlike, fantastical vision. Scattered white clouds drift overhead while soft shadows cross the dunes, and a slender vertical structure punctuates the distant horizon, completing the otherworldly, subconscious scene.
